zh.lifeSummary: 當Felicity Combe於1334年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾爾頓 福利亞特時，她的父親Richard Combe34歲，母親Maud London20歲。她於大約1355年與Lawrence de Calston在英國英格蘭維爾爾利特萊可特 帕克結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1364年在英國英格蘭享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: Combe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Michel.
Scottish (Midlothian and East Lothian): from Gaelic Mac Thom ‘son of Thom’, see Thomas . It is also a shortened form of McCombe .

variants.name: Thomas
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Breton, German, Dutch, Flemish, Danish, Greek, West Indian (mainly Haiti and Jamaica), and African (mainly Tanzania and Nigeria): from the personal name Thomas, of Biblical (New Testament) origin, from Aramaic t’ōm’a, a byname meaning ‘twin’. It was borne by one of the disciples of Christ, known for his scepticism about Christ's resurrection (John 20:24–29). The Th- spelling is organic, the initial letter of the name in the Greek New Testament being a theta. The English pronunciation as t rather than th- is the result of French influence from an early date. In Britain, the surname is widely distributed throughout the country, but especially common in Wales and Cornwall. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages (e.g. Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Toma and Tuma , Albanian Toma and Thoma , and Slavic surnames listed in 3 below), and their patronymics and other derivatives (e.g. Polish Tomaszewski and Slovenian Tomažič; see Tomazic ). In France, this surname is most common in the Vosges and Brittany. The name Thomas is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Machan , Mammen , and Oommen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Thomas (see 1 above) as a surname.

Germanized or Americanized form of Polish Tomas , Tomasz, and Tomaś, Sorbian Tomaš (see also 4 below), Croatian Tomaš and Tomas , Slovenian Tomaš and Tomaž, Czech and Slovak Tomáš, all meaning ‘Thomas’.

variants.name: Comeau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Camille, Alphie, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Murielle, Normand.
topographic name from a diminutive of come, a variant of combe ‘narrow valley, ravine’ (see Combe ).

nameMeanings.name: Felicity
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun denoting luck or good fortune (via Old French from Latin felicitas; compare Felix ), first used as a given name in the 17th century. It also represents the English form of the Late Latin personal name Felicitas, which was borne by several early saints, notably a slave who was martyred in 203 together with her mistress Perpetua and several other companions.

en.lifeSummary: When Felicity Combe was born in 1334, in Chilton Foliat, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Combe, was 34 and her mother, Maud London, was 20. She married Lawrence de Calston about 1355, in Littlecote Park, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1364, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Felicity Combe est née en 1334, à Chilton Foliat, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Combe, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maud London, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Lawrence de Calston environ 1355, à Littlecote Park, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1364, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Felicity Combe(이)가 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 치턴 폴리앳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Combe(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud London(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 리틀렉트 박에서 Lawrence de Calston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1364년 영국 잉글랜드에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Felicity Combe родилась в 1334 г. в местности чилтон фолят, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Combe было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maud London, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lawrence de Calston около 1355 г. в местности литлекот парк, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1364 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.
